case_title: RAINFLOREST FLORA, INC. VS SPELLMAN, TED DBA AKANTI, TNT ENTERPRISES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,391.60 FILED BY RAINFLOREST FLORA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPELLMAN, TED DBA AKANTI, TNT ENTERPRISES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 01
